subject: Your reps are spending 40% of their time on non-selling activities
body:
Hi [Name],

Salesforce's State of Sales report found that reps spend only 28% of their week actually selling. The rest: CRM updates, internal meetings, proposal formatting, and chasing approvals.

At your team size, that's roughly 2 full-time reps worth of capacity sitting idle every week.

[Product] automates CRM logging, proposal generation, and approval workflows — giving reps back 8–10 hours per week. One VP of Sales added $340K ARR in one quarter without hiring.

Worth 20 minutes to walk through?
why_it_works: data-driven — Salesforce citation + team-size calculation + ARR impact without headcount
